query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT id, 'Life Science Fundamentals', 'Introduction to cells, genetics, evolution, and ecology. Understand the structure and function of living organisms.', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Human Body Systems', 'Learn about the circulatory, respiratory, digestive, nervous, and other body systems. Understand how they work together to maintain health.', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Physical Science Basics', 'Explore matter, energy, forces, and motion. Understand atoms, elements, and basic chemistry concepts.', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Earth and Space Science', 'Learn about Earth''s structure, weather systems, the water cycle, and basic astronomy. Understand plate tectonics and geological processes.', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Chemical Reactions and Bonding', 'Understand how atoms bond, chemical equations, and types of reactions. Learn about acids, bases, and pH.', 5, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Energy and Waves', 'Explore kinetic and potential energy, conservation of energy, and properties of waves including sound and light.', 6, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Ecosystems and Biodiversity', 'Understand food chains, food webs, population dynamics, and biodiversity. Learn about human impact on ecosystems.', 7, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Scientific Method and Inquiry', 'Learn to design experiments, collect data, analyze results, and draw conclusions. Understand the importance of scientific evidence.', 8, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SC';
